data.raceComments: {"comment":"The Galilee Series Final kicks off the quaddie, and the staying 3-year-olds will race over 2400m for 200K. In a wide open lineup, we put 1. SINGLE CHOICE on top, after his tough effort for fifth in the G2 Alister Clark Stakes here 3 weeks ago, when he was looking for more ground. The extra 400m is the key, and he will be hard to hold out. 4. AMAZAKE was unlucky not to have won fresh up at Pakenham over 1600m, and he then ran on stoutly to finish fourth in the same race as the top pick last time out. He is still a maiden, but stepping up to 2400m will suit him, and he can't be taken lightly. Each-way. 6. ARABIAN PRINCE dropped down into a staying maiden at Kilmore 11 days ago and won as expected by well over a length under his own steam. This is much tougher, but his future is over these sorts of distances, and he can repeat the dose, especially on a wet track. 9. LUNAR FORCE finished runner-up by a neck in BM62 company at Kilmore last time out, and he can figure in the top 4 here.","runners":[1,4,6,9],"exclusive":true}
